title: Bronchitis Relief for the Immunocompromised: 9 Herbal Creams
description: Echinacea purpurea creams have been used traditionally to help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. The cream's active properties, including alkylamides, glycosides, and phenolic acids, work together to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation in the airways. These constituents help to stimulate the production of white blood cells, which fight off infections, and also have anti-inflammatory effects that soothe the irritated tissues in the throat and bronchi.
